meaning: n.注册,登记,注册处,登记处,船舶的国籍
examples: To edit it, you need to run the built-in Windows Registry editor.
Even if there isn't a registry, a good housewarming gift is something to decorate the new house with, like a piece of art or a plant.
There is no international registry of stolen art.
So I'll settle for challenging everyone who reads this to get on the Bone Marrow Registry.
Mr. Schaefer thinks his undisclosed dot-something could become a leading rival to the ubiquitous dot-com registry.
